productDisplayName: French Connection Men White Check Shirt
description: Style Note A brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this casual shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with oxford shoes and crisp trousers for a look that exudes confidence. Product Details White check shirt with slim buttoned down spread collar, full length buttoned placket, buttoned patch pocket on left chest with pen holder, short sleeve with buttoned tab, curved hem with brand patch and gusset Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with similar colours Iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
